Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Guild of Magisters]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — The Magister’s Guild contains an ancient research journal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Magister's Guild crest is an Open Book.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Magister’s Guild is an organization that vouches for the veracity of Readers and keeps them under scrutiny.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Mekendi Maxeus was the Head of the Magister's Guild.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Jorin Maze-walker's philosophies were instrumental in the creation of the Magister’s Guild.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Shera killed the Head of the Magister's Guild.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Magister’s Guild tests flying devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — The Magister's Guild sent a courier to Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — The Guild of Magisters is a group that the Emperor claims has no authority over his teachings.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
